crie.provider_agnostic: Channels reached through the Provider Adapter layer; no provider-specific logic in the workflow.

nodes.name: Execute Workflow Trigger
nodes.notes: Input: { event: 'WorkflowFailure'|'HumanReview'|'RepositoryCertificationFailure'|'Alert', severity, subject, body, correlation_id }.

nodes.name: Select Channel (config)
nodes.notes: email = supported (v1). slack/teams = future (declared, not implemented) per §268.

nodes.name: Send Email (Provider Adapter)
nodes.notes: Email dispatched via the Provider Adapter layer (no provider-specific node hardcoded here). SMTP/API target and credentials are config + adapter.

nodes.name: Log Unsupported Channel
nodes.notes: Future channel (slack/teams) requested but not implemented in v1 -> logged, not silently dropped (§269).
